style_rules: Write in third-person, past tense, objective, no promotional language. Use data to support all claims. Begin the Background section with a compelling hook: a dramatic quote, a surprising statistic, or a description of a crisis moment.

sections.title: Company Background
must_include: Founding year and founders ONLY if present in the FactSheet; otherwise omit entirely — never invent a founder name or year

sections.title: Industry Context
must_include: Market size or growth rate (only if supported by the FactSheet; otherwise describe qualitatively)
Name specific competitors ONLY if they appear in the FactSheet; otherwise refer to 'established competitors' generically — never invent company names
Important trends (technology, regulation, consumer behaviour) described generically without fabricated names or figures

sections.title: The Challenge
must_include: Quantitative evidence (e.g., sales drop, quality defects, turnover rate)

sections.title: Results & Impact
must_include: Unintended consequences (if any) - optional but recommended
